## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Checklist

- [ ] All TOML files parse without errors (`python3 -c "import tomllib; ..."`)
- [ ] All Markdown agents have a `#` heading on line 1
- [ ] Scoring formula matches between matched pairs (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested in both directions (Claude Code -> Codex and Codex -> Claude)
- [ ] Agents work without optional MCP servers
- [ ] `scripts/uninstall.sh` agent list updated (if adding/removing agents)
- [ ] `scripts/install.sh` updated (if adding new agent files)
